headline: A Look At Omnicom Group’s Valuation As Interpublic Deal Shapes Growth Expectations
summary: Omnicom Group (OMC) is back on many investors’ screens after recent share price moves, with the stock showing a roughly 5% gain over the past month and a small decline over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Omnicom Group. The recent 7 day share price return of 5.22% continues a 30 day share price gain of 4.81%. However, this follows a 3 month share price decline of 1.40% and a year to date share price decline of 3.26%. The 1 year total shareholder return of 11.64% contrasts with...

headline: The Trade Desk: Bottoming Signals Are Finally Flashing (Rating Upgrade)
summary: The Trade Desk has endured its steepest selloff in years, driven by worrisome competitive threats and fears. Check out why TTD stock is upgraded to buy.
